name: chitra
description: Direct, render, inspect, and revise cinematic motion-design videos with a deterministic quality floor.

interface.longDescription: Turn briefs and optional references, assets, links, or footage into directed motion-design videos through typed plans, deterministic rendering, quality gates, evidence, and surgical revision.
defaultPrompt: Create a cinematic product launch video from this brief
Use these references and brand assets to direct a video
Critique this Chitra render and fix the highest-impact issues
